description: Cross-cutting platform contracts that all layers (foundations, components, recipes, pages) must comply with.

contracts.title: Theme & Token Governance
rules: All visual values must reference semantic tokens, not raw values
Theme presets must pass contrast ratio validation (WCAG AA minimum)
Token overrides must use the official ThemeProvider API
Orphan tokens (unreferenced) must be flagged in CI

contracts.title: Accessibility Compliance
rules: All interactive elements must be keyboard-navigable
ARIA roles and labels must follow WAI-ARIA patterns
Focus management must use the platform FocusTrap/FocusScope utilities
Color-only information encoding is prohibited
Screen reader announcements for dynamic content changes

contracts.title: Internationalization & Localization
rules: All user-visible strings must use i18n keys, not hardcoded text
RTL layout support must be validated for all layout components
Date, number and currency formatting must use locale-aware formatters
Pluralization must use ICU message format

contracts.title: Density & Motion
rules: Density presets (compact/comfortable/spacious) must be respected by all surfaces
Motion must respect prefers-reduced-motion media query
Animation durations must use platform timing tokens
Border radius must use platform radius tokens

contracts.title: Component API Contract
rules: Public API surface must be explicitly exported and documented
Breaking changes require semver major bump and migration guide
Props must use TypeScript strict types (no any/unknown in public API)
Default values must be documented and tested

contracts.title: Recipe Workflow Contract
rules: Recipe must declare owner blocks (component dependencies)
Recipe must declare workflow intent
Recipe must reference at least one track for release binding
Recipe quality gates must include demo coverage

contracts.title: Page Shell Contract
rules: Page template must declare layout regions
Page template must declare building block dependencies
Page template must validate against foundation theme compliance
Page shell navigation zones must follow canonical nav patterns

contracts.title: Enterprise Data Surface Contract
rules: Data grid configurations must use the canonical grid theme bridge
Export functionality must support CSV, Excel and PDF
Server-side pagination must use the platform pagination helpers
Column definitions must be type-safe and serializable
Grid density must respect platform density tokens
